jd.raw_text: Back to jobs Senior Salesforce Engineer (CPQ) India - Remote Apply Who we are: Motive empowers the people who run physical operations with tools to make their work safer, more productive, and more profitable. For the first time ever, safety, operations and finance teams can manage their drivers, vehicles, equipment, and fleet related spend in a single system. Combined with industry leading AI, the Motive platform gives you complete visibility and control, and significantly reduces manual workloads by automating and simplifying tasks. Motive serves nearly 100,000 customers – from Fortune 500 enterprises to small businesses – across a wide range of industries, including transportation and logistics, construction, energy, field service, manufacturing, agriculture, food and beverage, retail, and the public sector. Visit gomotive.com to learn more. About the Job: As a Salesforce Developer in Motive’s Enterprise Systems team, you will be working with the team that is building and maintaining systems used by our Customers and internal Sales, Sales Operations, Marketing, Marketing Operations, Customer Success, Customer Support and Finance teams. You will be responsible for implementing scalable Salesforce related technical solutions that will significantly impact Motive’s growth and global expansion. What You’ll Do: Develop efficient and quality code supported by Salesforce platform Understand the scope & timeline of a program assigned Should be proficient in understanding and working in an integrated CI/CD space Collaborate with the cross functional team to understand customer requirements and provide technical expertise Conducting product demonstrations in Sprint Reviews, presenting technical solutions through POC as applicable and required Actively participate in scrum ceremonies Have a strong bias for action to respond to Production disruptions of any kind and resolve them as they happen. Adhere to Salesforce best practices, maintain code documentation, and write / maintain test classes for all custom development Write maintainable code with extensive test coverage, source control, adherence to release cycles, and continuous integration/continuous deployment practices. Work closely with technical SMEs to analyze the business needs and design tailored solutions using Salesforce products and platform capabilities. This may involve customizing Salesforce applications, integrating third-party systems, and architecting scalable solutions that meet customer requirements. Offer recommendations for optimizing and enhancing existing Salesforce implementations to maximize business value. Active participation in maintaining Production Quality, Tech Debt Control and DevOps procedures & processes Contribute to technical documentation Strong attention to detail and excellent problem solving skills. Continuous Learning: Stay updated with the latest Salesforce features, updates, and best practices. Participate in training programs, certifications, and industry events to expand knowledge and expertise in Salesforce technologies. What We’re Looking For: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. (Master’s degree preferred) 5+ years of Salesforce application development experience Salesforce CPQ certification, Platform Developer I certification or higher level certification. Expert in CPQ, LWC, Apex, VisualForce, SOQL/SOSL, and Javascript Experience with Salesforce Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, & Experience Cloud; Commerce Cloud experience is preferred Hands-on experience in implementing and executing CPQ solutions. Experienced with Salesforce SOAP API, REST API, and BULK API Extensive hands-on experience in integrating Salesforce with third-party and external systems. Practical experience leveraging GitHub Copilot to enhance coding efficiency and productivity. Experienced with Web UI frameworks in Visualforce pages or Lightning components Proficient in CI/CD DevOps procedures, GitHub, GearSet. Familiarity with sfdx is a plus Excellent communication and analytical skills Experience with Zuora Billing, Netsuite is a plus Experience with TDD, QA testing and framework testing a plus Creating a diverse and inclusive workplace is one of Motive's core values. We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome people of different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives. Please review our Candidate Privacy Notice here. UK Candidate Privacy Notice here. The applicant must be authorized to receive and access those commodities and technologies controlled under U.S. Export Administration Regulations. It is Motive's policy to require that employees be authorized to receive access to Motive products and technology. Create a Job Alert Interested in building your career at Motive? Get future opportunities sent straight to your email.
